narrative:
Jackson 28 (precinct in Stark County) has 950 registered voters, with 57.3% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 23.1% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 19.7%, a modest Republican lean of 3.4 percentage points.
